productDisplayName: Roxy Women Sneaky Super High Brown Casual Shoes
description: High-top sneakers from roxy give a high-fashion spin to your off-duty wardrobe. Designed with the right balance of fashion and lifestyle referencing, this shoe mimics worker boots in its design. Wear this with a tonal T-shirt, skinny jeans and a structured blazer or jacket.UpperHigh-top leather upper with overlays on the heelStitch detailing and print on the the upperFaux fleece liningCentral lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tonguePadded insole for instep comfortZipper on the medial side of the footMidsolePU midsole OutsoleTextured rubber outsole Shoe careDo not store in direct sunlight
